3035610.name: Woohoo! - Game "Escape & Evade"
3035610.description:
Escape & Evade is a game where you need to reach the exit without being detected. You'll need to be stealthy and stay out of sight from the security cameras while maneuvering around obstacles. Make sure you disable the lasers before you walk through a door protected by lasers.

When you buy and install this DLC, the mini-game will appear on the main menu as an option in the games list.
Click or touch the game in the games list to start a new level.

Touchscreen Support

Woohoo! - Game "Escape & Evade" supports touchscreens. You can also use a stylus pen or your finger to move the player.
(Touchscreen-enabled laptop or tablet required.)
